name: Needler Pistol
description:
This strange pistol resembles a flask with a honeycomb of tubes sticking out its front. The weapon is powered by an {@item energy cell} stored at the base of the flask. Placing a full {@item energy cell} in the pistol gives the pistol 10 charges.
As an action while holding this pistol, you can expend 1 of its charges to fire a burst of glowing, needlelike darts from the pistol in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking {@damage 8d4} piercing
